Description: Verify that the Implementation Under Test(IUT) successfully indicated that the current operation was pressed.Not all commands(fast forward and rewind for example) have a noticeable effect when pressed for a short period of time.For commands like that it is acceptable to assume the effect took placeand press 'YES'.
